title: DistantVanilla
description: A fully Client-sided Modpack with beautiful Visuals.
body:
A Client side Modpack with good visual.

you will have to get the Distant horizons Supported Bliss shader yourself through their official Github page [Here](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)

I will also provide you the link to the direct Download [Here](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/archive/refs/heads/main.zip)
